ham.subject: Out of Office: Rohan Sharma on Leave
ham.body:
Hi Team,

I hope you are doing well. I will be out of office from 15th May to 20th May 2024 for a brief vacation. During this period, I will have limited access to email.

For any urgent matters related to the project, please reach out to my colleague Anjali Patel at anjali.patel@example.com or call her at +91-9876543210.

Thank you for your understanding.

Best regards,
Rohan Sharma

spam.subject: URGENT: Password Reset Required – Immediate Action Needed
spam.body:
Dear User,

This is the IT helpdesk. Our system has detected suspicious activity on your account. To protect your data and prevent potential security breaches, we urgently require you to reset your password.

Please click on the link below and complete the verification process within 15 minutes:
<URL>

Failure to comply may result in temporary lockout of your account.

Regards,
IT Support Team
Helpdesk
+91-8001234567
